text.title: Hexagonal Architecture (Ports and Adapters) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how arch-pattern-hexagonal produces a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: hex-layout-shop-2026-05-23 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> ---
# Shop — Hexagonal Layout
## Core - domain/order.py — Order, LineItem - application/place_order.py — PlaceOrderUseCase implements OrderInputPort
## Driving ports + adapters | Port | Adapter | Kind | |------|---------|------| | OrderInputPort | adapters/http/order_controller.py | driving | | OrderInputPort | adapters/cli/place_order_cmd.py | driving |
## Driven ports + adapters | Port | Adapter | |------|---------| | OrderRepositoryPort | adapters/db/sqlalchemy_order_repo.py | | PaymentPort | adapters/payment/stripe_adapter.py |
## Lint - Tool: importlinter - Contract: independence — domain.* MUST NOT import adapters.*
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
